parameters.query: SELECT u.name, u.whatsapp_number, u.whatsapp_opted_in, j.current_affirmation_day, j.current_calendar_day, j.transformation_score, j.track FROM users u JOIN journeys j ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE j.id = '{{ $json.body.journey_id }}'

body.rawBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ template: 'progress_card_template_uid', modifications: [ { name: 'user_name', text: $json.name }, { name: 'day_number', text: 'Day ' + $('Webhook: Day Complete').item.json.body.day_number + ' Complete' }, { name: 'transformation_score', text: Math.round($json.transformation_score) + '/100' }, { name: 'calendar_vs_affirmation', text: $json.current_calendar_day + ' calendar · ' + $json.current_affirmation_day + ' affirmation' } ], webhook_url: $env.BACKEND_URL + '/api/webhooks/progress-card-ready', metadata: JSON.stringify({ journey_id: $('Webhook: Day Complete').item.json.body.journey_id, day_number: $('Webhook: Day Complete').item.json.body.day_number }) }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ phone_number: $('get-user-for-completion').item.json.whatsapp_number, template_name: 'milestone_' + $('Webhook: Day Complete').item.json.body.day_number, broadcast_name: 'milestone', parameters: [ { name: 'user_name', value: $('get-user-for-completion').item.json.name }, { name: 'score_before', value: String($('Webhook: Day Complete').item.json.body.score_before || '—') }, { name: 'score_now', value: String(Math.round($('get-user-for-completion').item.json.transformation_score)) } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ phone_number: $('get-user-for-completion').item.json.whatsapp_number, template_name: 'day_complete', broadcast_name: 'day_complete', parameters: [ { name: 'day_number', value: String($('Webhook: Day Complete').item.json.body.day_number) }, { name: 'score', value: String(Math.round($('get-user-for-completion').item.json.transformation_score)) } ] }) }}
